modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to change the report view in Excel.

full_description_text: So, during a live chat, the user was trying to figure out how to switch up the view of their report in Excel. They seemed a bit stuck and were looking for a way to make it more readable or maybe just different. It’s one of those things that should be simple, but sometimes Excel can be a bit tricky, right?
short_description: Unable to change the report view in Excel.
